title: Verify homepage floating pill visibility from Day 2 to Day 10
description: Test that a floating pill is displayed on the homepage for a user from Day 2 to Day 10 of their trial.
preconditions: User is in the Trial Corner cohort
User's trial is between Day 2 and Day 10

steps.description: 1. Log in as an eligible trial user on Day 2.

expected_result: A floating pill acting as the entry point to the Trial Corner is visible on the homepage.
